title: ModuleSpec
description: Describes an implementation module that satisfies one or more CapSpecs (capabilities).

id.description: Stable module identifier (lowerCamelCase or kebab-case; unique in a deployment).

version.description: Semantic version of the module artifact.

packagePath.description: Relative path within the module package root.

implements.description: Capability names this module provides (must match CapSpec contracts).

requiresCapabilities.description: Capabilities this module invokes via platform routing (not necessarily implemented locally).

handlesPlatformLifecycle.description: If true, the module must handle platform lifecycle events (see ModuleSpec / memcos docs).

deployment.description: Optional deployment hints (env, replicas, secrets refs — platform-specific).

captestPrefix.description: Optional capability name prefix for automated captest runs.
